title: RSI Divergence Detector
author: DragonFly-Trading
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: RSI Divergence Detector by DragonFly-Trading.
This indicator automatically detects bullish and bearish RSI divergences and displays them directly on the price chart.
A bullish divergence occurs when price forms a lower low while RSI forms a higher low, which may indicate weakening bearish momentum and a potential upward reversal.
A bearish divergence occurs when price forms a higher high while RSI forms a lower high, which may signal weakening bullish momentum and a possible downward reversal.
The script uses pivot highs and lows on … This indicator automatically detects bullish and bearish RSI divergences and displays them directly on the price chart.
The script uses pivot highs and lows on … Possible indicators: RSI.
